selection_policy: Selected a same task/model/seed C1 pair from existing Phase 8C raw artifacts: O0 silent fails with a hidden violation; O3 structured feedback succeeds after the agent revises payment method.

cases.api_feedback: No visible policy error; call remains syntactically valid.
cases.interpretation: The agent follows the baseline-compatible payment workflow, but the evolved semantic rule is silent and only the hidden oracle detects the violation.

cases.api_feedback: Structured policy error on payment_methods: Use a single payment method or request explicit approval.
cases.interpretation: The visible diagnostic exposes the changed semantic rule; the agent changes the payment workflow and completes the task.
